channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Horoscope for July 4, 2026: Insights for Each Zodiac Sign
item.description: The article provides daily horoscope predictions for July 4, 2026, tailored to each zodiac sign. Aries experiences a surge of energy from Mars and Uranus alignment, encouraging bold action. Taurus is ...

item.title: Scientists Create Synthetic Cell with Key Life Functions in Lab
item.description: Researchers at the University of Minnesota have developed a synthetic cell called SpudCell, which demonstrates fundamental life processes such as growth, DNA replication, division, and trait inheritan...

item.title: LHC rules courts must assess full context in marriage dispute cases
item.description: The Lahore High Court (LHC) has issued a landmark ruling stating that courts cannot rely solely on documentary evidence like nikahnama (marriage certificates) to resolve marriage disputes. In a case i...

item.title: Former CBN Governor Emefiele Faces Charges Over Alleged $6.2M Fraud

item.title: Rockstar Games faces criticism over workplace practices and pay disparities
item.description: Rockstar Games, the developer behind the upcoming GTA 6, is facing allegations from union members regarding unfair workplace practices. The Rockstar Game Workers Union (RGWU) claims the studio enables...

item.title: Black Market Dollar to Naira Exchange Rate for July 4th, 2026

item.title: Luo Musician Tony Ndiema's Partner Shares Heartbreaking Tribute After His Passing

item.title: Three Die in Wisconsin Lake Boat Capsizing During Storm
item.description: Three people died and seven others were rescued after a boat capsized on Geneva Lake in Wisconsin during a severe storm, according to officials. The incident occurred on Friday as a strong storm swept...

item.title: Indian Seafarer's Missing Organs and Discrepancies in Venezuela Death Case
item.description: The body of 33-year-old Indian seafarer Rakesh Chauhan, who died in Venezuela's Falcon state on May 7, was repatriated to India with all vital organs missing, including brain, heart, lungs, liver, kid...

item.title: Winnipeg Campers Evacuate Due to Safety Concerns
item.description: A group of campers at Duck Mountain in Winnipeg, Manitoba, were evacuated on Saturday as part of a safety protocol. The decision to evacuate was made following an assessment of potential risks, though...

item.title: RSS and Bajrang Dal Address Ayodhya Temple Donation Controversy
item.description: The RSS and Bajrang Dal have addressed the controversy surrounding the alleged theft of donations to the Ayodhya Ram Temple. The Rashtriya Swayamsevak Sangh (RSS) demanded a thorough investigation and...
